full_text:
Dong Huang 董璜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Huang (董璜)was born in Longxi. Palace Attendant under his uncle Dong Zhuo. Killed by Huangfu Song. Dong Huang was affiliated with Dong Zhuo. Dong Huang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
